## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Motivation

Explain why this change is needed.

## Considerations

Talk me through what you've considered before and during making the change.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run` when the package surface or publish output changed

## Docs impact

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] `docs/` updated

## API or behavior notes

Call out any public API, semantic, or browser-support impact.
